task_completion.description: Log in to the Artifactory web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory web interface is visible in the browser at http://localhost:8082, showing the main dashboard or welcome screen, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Virtual Repositories administration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration module is active (usually a gear icon), and the 'Repositories' -> 'Virtual' menu or list is displayed.

task_completion.description: Open the settings for the 'team-virtual' repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration or edit screen for the virtual repository specifically named 'team-virtual' is open.

task_completion.description: Prioritize 'team-local' over 'team-remote' in the resolution order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Selected Repositories' or 'Included Repositories' list for 'team-virtual', the repository 'team-local' is visually placed above or before 'team-remote'.
The 'Save' or 'Apply' button was clicked, evidenced by a success notification (e.g., 'Successfully updated repository') or the browser returning to the virtual repositories list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Artifactory Web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and Artifactory UI, rather than using terminal curl commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Artifactory instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8082 and the interface is the genuine JFrog Artifactory application, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual order.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manipulate the DOM text of the repository list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target virtual repository is 'team-virtual'. The correct resolution order must have 'team-local' listed first (prioritized) and 'team-remote' listed second. The Artifactory instance is located at http://localhost:8082.
